missions.title: Atomic Structure - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering electromagnetic radiation, photoelectric effect, hydrogen spectrum and more.

microtargets.title: Electromagnetic radiation
mustKnowFacts: Electromagnetic radiation is a fundamental subtopic of Atomic Structure.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Electromagnetic radiation for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Electromagnetic radiation during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Electromagnetic radiation.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Electromagnetic radiation.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Electromagnetic radiation.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Electromagnetic radiation.
What is a common trap associated with Electromagnetic radiation?
